lineup_source: Türkiye vs Paraguay, Group D, 19 June 2026 (4-2-3-1, Montella)

players.name: Uğurcan Çakır
players.note: Born in Antalya; father Mustafa and mother Gülsüm both Turkish, family with roots also in Trabzon.

players.name: Zeki Çelik
players.note: Born in Yıldırım, Bursa Province, to a family of Kurdish descent originally from Muş; parents' details undocumented.

players.name: Merih Demiral
players.note: Born in Karamürsel, Kocaeli, to Turkish parents Burhan and Fatma; father of Laz heritage, mother's family of Bosnian heritage migrated from Artvin generations back, both raised in Turkey.

players.name: Abdülkerim Bardakcı
players.note: Born in Meram, Konya; no parental origin documented, Turkish family assumed.

players.name: Ferdi Kadıoğlu
players.note: Born in Arnhem to a Turkish father and a Dutch-Canadian mother; was a Dutch youth international before choosing Turkey.

players.name: Hakan Çalhanoğlu
players.note: Born in Mannheim to Turkish parents originally from Bayburt; captains the Turkey national team.

players.name: Orkun Kökçü
players.note: Born in Haarlem to Turkish parents (Halis and Sibel) from the Emirdağ district of Afyonkarahisar; family emigrated to the Netherlands in 1995.

players.name: Barış Alper Yılmaz
players.note: Born and raised in Rize; no parental origin documented, Turkish family assumed.

players.name: Arda Güler
players.note: Born in the Altındağ district of Ankara to Turkish parents Ümit and Serap Güler, a working-class family.

players.name: Kenan Yıldız
players.note: Born in Regensburg to a Turkish father, Engin Yıldız (from Dinar, Afyonkarahisar), and a German mother, Beate Hackl; holds dual nationality but chose Turkey.

players.name: Kerem Aktürkoğlu
players.note: Born in İzmit to Turkish parents Ömer Faruk (from Rize) and Filiz (from Trabzon); survived the 1999 İzmit earthquake as an infant.
